pilot.role: Screening only; passing the pilot authorized only the preregistered scout.

scoreDeltaPoint.interpretation: The interval crosses zero, so this is not evidence of a statistically demonstrated regression. The preregistered conservative scout rule nevertheless rejects any negative point estimate.

integrityForensics.objectiveComparisonCanonicalization: Delete selected and retained, recursively sort object keys, serialize compact JSON plus a trailing newline, and SHA-256 hash the bytes.
integrityForensics.finding: The treatment and control comparison payloads match after removing selected and retained. Treatment changed candidate zero from shipped to strict, then a13 returned a different action object; control retained shipped candidate zero. Core laps differ, but the cohort did not serialize a13's chosen action.
integrityForensics.codeSemantics: BattleEngine forwards incumbent policy events as retained only when SearchDriver returns the exact incumbent action-array reference. retained=false therefore means a13 overrode strict; it does not prove that shipped executed.
integrityForensics.disposition: This is a real search-mediated confinement and missing-executed-action-telemetry failure, not malformed route metadata and not an analyzer false positive. The frozen analyzer correctly failed closed.

protocolDisposition.reason: The preregistration requires an immediate stop after any scout gate or integrity failure. Instrumentation or threshold changes after outcome access create a new candidate, fresh seed master, analyzer, and protocol.

postOutcomeHypothesisNotUsableForPromoti.purpose: Fresh-candidate design only. These subgroup values are outcome-mined and cannot rescue, qualify, or promote this stopped candidate.
postOutcomeHypothesisNotUsableForPromoti.gameplayRationale: Outside the explicit urgent/dominant finish state, strict and shipped already deliver the same immediate full-damage, zero-reachable-threat shot. Replacing shipped positioning should therefore require a decisive four-cell compression rather than a marginal one-cell-over-shipped nudge.
requiredBeforeAnyNewOutcomes: Serialize the exact post-a13 chosen action and execution result for every screened-closer comparison.
Define causal exposure from matched final chosen actions, including search-mediated candidate-zero interactions, rather than inferring execution solely from retained incumbent events.
Implement and test the decisive-compression or finish exception as a separately named default-off selector.
Commit and push clean source plus a fresh preregistration, fresh randomly generated seed master, and a newly frozen analyzer.

limitations: The scout's unchanged 2% raw Armageddon-decided rate is a feature-specific observation, not progress toward the requested global near-zero Armageddon rate.
This screening phase cannot establish default readiness or promotion.
The same-sample subgroup arithmetic is explicitly post-hoc and has no confirmatory evidentiary value.
Renderer projectile endpoints remain outside this strategy experiment.
